title: Declaration
template_text: [TEMPLATE - ATTORNEY REVIEW REQUIRED] I, {{ testator_name }}, a resident of {{ county }} County, Texas, declare this as my Last Will and Testament.

title: Revocation
template_text: [TEMPLATE - ATTORNEY REVIEW REQUIRED] I revoke all prior wills and codicils.

title: Independent Executor
template_text: [TEMPLATE - ATTORNEY REVIEW REQUIRED] I appoint {{ executor_name }} as Independent Executor, to serve without bond if permitted.

title: Guardian Nomination
template_text: [TEMPLATE - ATTORNEY REVIEW REQUIRED] If any child is a minor, I nominate the guardian listed in this instrument.

title: Residuary Estate
template_text: [TEMPLATE - ATTORNEY REVIEW REQUIRED] I devise the residue of my estate as allocated in Schedule A.

title: Specific Gifts
template_text: [TEMPLATE - ATTORNEY REVIEW REQUIRED] The following specific bequests are made as listed in Schedule B.

title: Digital Assets
template_text: [TEMPLATE - ATTORNEY REVIEW REQUIRED] My fiduciary may access and manage my digital assets consistent with Texas law.

title: Self-Proving Affidavit
template_text: [TEMPLATE - ATTORNEY REVIEW REQUIRED] A self-proving affidavit is attached and incorporated for execution formalities.
